case_title: ATLAS ELEVATOR COMPANY VS KEAN HOTEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,023.16 FILED BY ATLAS ELEVATOR COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KEAN HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLAS ELEVATOR COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEAN HOTEL $1,023.16 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,068.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
